review_comment: While shorter, I think it would make the intent less obvious. Also the longer version matches `config_parse_syscall_filter()` (since it was copied from there) but the comments show the difference between "allow" and "log" actions when talking about allow-lists or deny-lists. Of course the comments could be retained somehow with the short version.
The compiler generates the same code without branches, except for -O0, where shorter version produces better code ([godbolt](https://godbolt.org/z/eWj6GP)).
